raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX - XXXX of XXXX XXXX charged my credit card for XXXX XXXX XXXX I didn't order it nor did I get it. My husband ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) had dealt with this company in the past. 
Since we did not get anything I did not check my Citi credit card. In XXXX of XXXX my credit score dropped. I immediately checked for a reason and found the Citi Credit reported I didn't pay my XX/XX/XXXX statement. 
I called Citi Card they said OK. My husband contacted XXXX XXXX resolve this issue. XXXX customer service sent my husband XXXX an email and confirmed the refund will ( confirmation # XXXX ) go to Citi Card. XXXX stated it could take up 3 days. 
Citi Card ( diamond preferred ). Citi said they would credit the amount, 3 days to show as well. 
XXXX I get an email saying I owe my missed payment of {$110.00} to Card. This has gone on month after month with no resolution. Citi card claims XXXX said it was a valid charge. 
I called XXXX ( XX/XX/XXXX ) they say they refunded the charge on XX/XX/XXXX and gave me an ID # for the refund # XXXX at XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. 
Still getting emails and now phone calls from collections.
